---
title: "06_dydid"
author: Tyler L. McIntosh
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Contents
    toc-location: right
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
---


# Setup for analysis

``` {r setupchunk}
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: 'hide'

rm(list = ls())

if(!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("here")
}
library(here)

source(here::here("utils", "functions.R"))

# install_load_packages(c(
#   "tidyverse",
#   "tictoc",
#   "hstats",
#   "glue",
#   "shapviz",
#   #"patchwork",
#   #"cobalt",
#   #"corrplot",
#   #"gridExtra",
#   "fect",
#   "fixest",
#   "did",
#   "arrow",
#   "panelView",
#   "PanelMatch",
#   "didimputation",
#   "doParallel",
#   "HonestDid",
#   "HonestDidFEct",
#   "DIDmultiplegtDYN",
#   "sf",
#   "spdep",
#   "gstat",
#   "scales",
#   "broom",
#   "ggfixest"))

install_load_packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "tictoc",
  "glue",
  "fixest",
  "arrow"
))

dir_figs <- here::here('figs', "GEE_resilience_v6_operational_ss500_ts50000")
dir_derived <- here::here('data', 'derived', 'GEE_resilience_v6_operational_ss500_ts50000')
#dir_derived <- here::here('data', 'derived', 'idb_500_20251130')
dir_raw <- here::here('data', 'raw')
dir_manual <- here::here('data', 'manual')
dir_ensure(c(dir_figs,
             dir_derived,
             dir_manual,
             dir_raw))

seed = 1234
set.seed(seed)


```


```{r}

plot_saved_sunab_subgroups <- function(coef_tbl,
                                       analysis_id,
                                       group_id,
                                       outcome,
                                       model_id = NULL,
                                       vcov_id = NULL,
                                       title = NULL,
                                       caption = NULL,
                                       baseline = -6,
                                       xlim = c(-10, 20),
                                       ylim = c(-50, 10),
                                       ribbon = TRUE,
                                       group_palette = c(
                                         f = "red3",
                                         df = "goldenrod",
                                         bf = "darkgreen",
                                         bdf = "dodgerblue3"
                                       ),
                                       show_n = TRUE) {
  
  dt <- coef_tbl |>
    dplyr::filter(
      analysis_id == .env$analysis_id,
      group_id == .env$group_id,
      outcome == .env$outcome,
      term_matches_pattern
    )
  
  if (!is.null(model_id)) {
    dt <- dt |>
      dplyr::filter(model_id == .env$model_id)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(vcov_id)) {
    dt <- dt |>
      dplyr::filter(vcov_id == .env$vcov_id)
  }
  
  if (nrow(dt) == 0) {
    stop("No rows found for the requested combination.")
  }
  
  subgroup_labels <- dt |>
  dplyr::distinct(subgroup, n_treated_units, n_treated_events) |>
  dplyr::arrange(subgroup)

  if (show_n) {
    subgroup_labels <- subgroup_labels |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        subgroup_label = paste0(
          subgroup,
          "\nN_pt = ", scales::comma(n_treated_units),
          "\nN_fire = ", scales::comma(n_treated_events)
        )
      )
  } else {
    subgroup_labels <- subgroup_labels |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        subgroup_label = subgroup
      )
  }
  
  dt <- dt |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      subgroup_labels |>
        dplyr::select(subgroup, subgroup_label),
      by = "subgroup"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      subgroup = factor(subgroup, levels = names(group_palette)),
      subgroup_label = factor(
        subgroup_label,
        levels = subgroup_labels$subgroup_label[match(names(group_palette), subgroup_labels$subgroup)]
      )
    )
  
  palette_use <- group_palette[names(group_palette) %in% unique(as.character(dt$subgroup))]
  label_map <- subgroup_labels$subgroup_label
  names(label_map) <- subgroup_labels$subgroup
  
  if (is.null(title)) {
    title <- paste(
      "DyDID analysis for",
      analysis_id,
      "|",
      group_id,
      "|",
      outcome
    )
  }
  
  if (is.null(caption)) {
    caption_parts <- c()
    
    if (!is.null(model_id)) {
      caption_parts <- c(caption_parts, paste("Model:", model_id))
    }
    
    if (!is.null(vcov_id)) {
      vcov_label_use <- dt |>
        dplyr::distinct(vcov_label) |>
        dplyr::pull(vcov_label)
      
      if (length(vcov_label_use) == 1) {
        caption_parts <- c(caption_parts, vcov_label_use)
      } else {
        caption_parts <- c(caption_parts, paste("VCOV:", vcov_id))
      }
    }
    
    caption_parts <- c(caption_parts, "95% confidence intervals shown")
    caption <- paste(caption_parts, collapse = "\n")
  }
  
  if (ribbon) {
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      dt,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = term_value,
        y = estimate,
        color = subgroup,
        fill = subgroup,
        group = subgroup
      )
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2) +
      ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
        ggplot2::aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper),
        alpha = 0.2,
        color = NA
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = baseline,
        linetype = "dashed",
        color = "gray40"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = 0,
        linetype = "dashed",
        color = "red"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_hline(
        yintercept = 0,
        color = "black"
      ) +
      ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
        values = palette_use,
        breaks = names(palette_use),
        labels = label_map[names(palette_use)]
      ) +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
        values = palette_use,
        breaks = names(palette_use),
        labels = label_map[names(palette_use)]
      ) +
      ggplot2::labs(
        x = "Event time",
        y = "Treatment effect",
        title = title,
        caption = caption,
        color = NULL,
        fill = NULL
      ) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(lineheight = 1.1)) +
      ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
  } else {
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      dt,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = term_value,
        y = estimate,
        color = subgroup,
        group = subgroup
      )
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(y = ci_upper),
        linetype = "dotted",
        linewidth = 0.8
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(y = ci_lower),
        linetype = "dotted",
        linewidth = 0.8
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = baseline,
        linetype = "dashed",
        color = "gray40"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = 0,
        linetype = "dashed",
        color = "red"
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_hline(
        yintercept = 0,
        color = "black"
      ) +
      ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
        values = palette_use,
        breaks = names(palette_use),
        labels = label_map[names(palette_use)]
      ) +
      ggplot2::labs(
        x = "Event time",
        y = "Treatment effect",
        title = title,
        caption = caption,
        color = NULL
      ) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right",
        legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(lineheight = 1.1)) +
      ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
  }
  
  p
}

plot_saved_sunab_multi_outcome <- function(coef_tbl,
                                           analysis_id,
                                           group_id,
                                           outcomes = NULL,
                                           model_id = NULL,
                                           vcov_id = NULL,
                                           title = NULL,
                                           caption = NULL,
                                           baseline = -6,
                                           xlim = c(-10, 20),
                                           ylim = c(-50, 10),
                                           show_ci = TRUE,
                                           ci_style = c("ribbon", "lines"),
                                           group_palette = c(
                                             f = "red3",
                                             df = "goldenrod",
                                             bf = "darkgreen",
                                             bdf = "dodgerblue3"
                                           ),
                                           outcome_linetypes = c(
                                             rap_tree = "solid",
                                             vcf_tree = "dashed"
                                           ),
                                           show_n = TRUE,
                                           n_label = c("units", "events", "both", "none")) {
  
  ci_style <- match.arg(ci_style)
  n_label <- match.arg(n_label)
  
  dt <- coef_tbl |>
    dplyr::filter(
      analysis_id == .env$analysis_id,
      group_id == .env$group_id,
      term_matches_pattern
    )
  
  if (!is.null(outcomes)) {
    dt <- dt |>
      dplyr::filter(outcome %in% .env$outcomes)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(model_id)) {
    dt <- dt |>
      dplyr::filter(model_id == .env$model_id)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(vcov_id)) {
    dt <- dt |>
      dplyr::filter(vcov_id == .env$vcov_id)
  }
  
  if (nrow(dt) == 0) {
    stop("No rows found for the requested combination.")
  }
  
  subgroup_labels <- dt |>
    dplyr::distinct(subgroup, n_treated_units, n_treated_events) |>
    dplyr::arrange(subgroup)
  
  if (show_n) {
    subgroup_labels <- subgroup_labels |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        subgroup_label = dplyr::case_when(
          n_label == "units" ~ paste0(
            subgroup,
            "\nN_pt = ",
            scales::comma(n_treated_units)
          ),
          n_label == "events" ~ paste0(
            subgroup,
            "\nN_ev = ",
            scales::comma(n_treated_events)
          ),
          n_label == "both" ~ paste0(
            subgroup,
            "\nN_pt = ",
            scales::comma(n_treated_units),
            "\nN_ev = ",
            scales::comma(n_treated_events)
          ),
          TRUE ~ subgroup
        )
      )
  } else {
    subgroup_labels <- subgroup_labels |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        subgroup_label = subgroup
      )
  }
  
  dt <- dt |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      subgroup_labels |>
        dplyr::select(subgroup, subgroup_label),
      by = "subgroup"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      subgroup = factor(subgroup, levels = names(group_palette)),
      outcome = factor(outcome, levels = names(outcome_linetypes))
    )
  
  palette_use <- group_palette[names(group_palette) %in% unique(as.character(dt$subgroup))]
  linetype_use <- outcome_linetypes[names(outcome_linetypes) %in% unique(as.character(dt$outcome))]
  
  label_map <- subgroup_labels$subgroup_label
  names(label_map) <- subgroup_labels$subgroup
  
  if (is.null(title)) {
    title <- paste(
      "DyDID analysis for",
      analysis_id,
      "|",
      group_id
    )
  }
  
  if (is.null(caption)) {
    caption_parts <- c()
    
    if (!is.null(model_id)) {
      caption_parts <- c(caption_parts, paste("Model:", model_id))
    }
    
    if (!is.null(vcov_id)) {
      vcov_label_use <- dt |>
        dplyr::distinct(vcov_label) |>
        dplyr::pull(vcov_label)
      
      if (length(vcov_label_use) == 1) {
        caption_parts <- c(caption_parts, vcov_label_use)
      } else {
        caption_parts <- c(caption_parts, paste("VCOV:", vcov_id))
      }
    }
    
    if (show_ci) {
      caption_parts <- c(caption_parts, "95% confidence intervals shown")
    }
    
    caption <- paste(caption_parts, collapse = "\n")
  }
  
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    dt,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = term_value,
      y = estimate,
      color = subgroup,
      linetype = outcome,
      group = interaction(subgroup, outcome)
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2)
  
  if (show_ci) {
    
    if (ci_style == "ribbon") {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
          ggplot2::aes(
            ymin = ci_lower,
            ymax = ci_upper,
            fill = subgroup,
            group = interaction(subgroup, outcome)
          ),
          alpha = 0.15,
          color = NA,
          linetype = 0,
          inherit.aes = TRUE
        )
    }
    
    if (ci_style == "lines") {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = ci_upper,
            group = interaction(subgroup, outcome)
          ),
          linewidth = 0.7,
          alpha = 0.8
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = ci_lower,
            group = interaction(subgroup, outcome)
          ),
          linewidth = 0.7,
          alpha = 0.8
        )
    }
  }
  
  p <- p +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
      xintercept = baseline,
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "gray40"
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
      xintercept = 0,
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "red"
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(
      yintercept = 0,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
      values = palette_use,
      breaks = names(palette_use),
      labels = label_map[names(palette_use)]
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_linetype_manual(
      values = linetype_use
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Event time",
      y = "Treatment effect",
      title = title,
      caption = caption,
      color = NULL,
      linetype = "Outcome"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(lineheight = 1.1)
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
  
  if (show_ci && ci_style == "ribbon") {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
        values = palette_use,
        breaks = names(palette_use),
        labels = label_map[names(palette_use)],
        guide = "none"
      )
  }
  
  p
}


```


```{r}

coef_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_results, "tables", "all", "coef_expanded_vcov.parquet")
)

group_palette <- c(
  f = "red3",
  df = "goldenrod",
  bf = "darkgreen",
  bdf = "dodgerblue3"
)

p1 <- plot_saved_sunab_subgroups(
  coef_tbl = coef_tbl,
  analysis_id = "bluemtns",
  group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
  outcome = "vcf_tree",
  model_id = "sunab_main",
  vcov_id = "conley_125km_20km",
  baseline = -6,
  xlim = c(-10, 20),
  ylim = c(-50, 10),
  ribbon = TRUE,
  group_palette = group_palette
)

p1

p2 <- plot_saved_sunab_subgroups(
  coef_tbl = coef_tbl,
  analysis_id = "bluemtns",
  group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
  outcome = "vcf_tree",
  model_id = "sunab_main",
  vcov_id = "conley_50km_10km",
  baseline = -6,
  xlim = c(-10, 20),
  ylim = c(-50, 10),
  ribbon = TRUE,
  group_palette = group_palette
)

p2

```


```{r}

group_palette <- c(
  f = "red3",
  df = "goldenrod",
  bf = "darkgreen",
  bdf = "dodgerblue3"
)

outcome_linetypes <- c(
  rap_tree = "solid",
  vcf_tree = "dashed"
)

coef_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_results, "tables", "all", "coef_expanded_vcov.parquet")
)

p <- plot_saved_sunab_multi_outcome(
  coef_tbl = coef_tbl,
  analysis_id = "bluemtns",
  group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
  outcomes = c("rap_tree", "vcf_tree"),
  model_id = "sunab_main",
  vcov_id = "conley_125km_20km",
  baseline = -6,
  xlim = c(-10, 20),
  ylim = c(-50, 10),
  #ribbon = FALSE,
  group_palette = group_palette,
  outcome_linetypes = outcome_linetypes,
  show_n = TRUE,
  n_label = "both",
  show_ci = FALSE
)

p

```


```{r}
plot_saved_sunab_general <- function(coef_tbl,
                                     filters = list(),
                                     color_var,
                                     linetype_var = NULL,
                                     facet_var = NULL,
                                     facet_ncol = NULL,
                                     facet_scales = "fixed",
                                     show_ci = TRUE,
                                     ci_style = c("ribbon", "lines"),
                                     title = NULL,
                                     caption = NULL,
                                     baseline = -6,
                                     xlim = c(-10, 20),
                                     ylim = c(-50, 10),
                                     color_values = NULL,
                                     linetype_values = NULL,
                                     legend_title_color = NULL,
                                     legend_title_linetype = NULL,
                                     label_var = NULL,
                                     show_n = FALSE,
                                     n_label = c("units", "events", "both", "none")) {
  
  ci_style <- match.arg(ci_style)
  n_label <- match.arg(n_label)
  
  dt <- coef_tbl |>
    dplyr::filter(term_matches_pattern)
  
  if (length(filters) > 0) {
    for (nm in names(filters)) {
      dt <- dt |>
        dplyr::filter(.data[[nm]] %in% filters[[nm]])
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(dt) == 0) {
    stop("No rows found after applying filters.")
  }
  
  if (!color_var %in% names(dt)) {
    stop("color_var not found in coef_tbl.")
  }
  
  if (!is.null(linetype_var) && !linetype_var %in% names(dt)) {
    stop("linetype_var not found in coef_tbl.")
  }
  
  if (!is.null(facet_var) && !facet_var %in% names(dt)) {
    stop("facet_var not found in coef_tbl.")
  }
  
  if (is.null(label_var)) {
    label_var <- color_var
  }
  
  if (!label_var %in% names(dt)) {
    stop("label_var not found in coef_tbl.")
  }
  
  label_tbl <- dt |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(unique(c(color_var, label_var)))),
      n_treated_units,
      n_treated_events
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      color_key = .data[[color_var]],
      label_key = .data[[label_var]]
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(
      color_key,
      label_key,
      n_treated_units,
      n_treated_events
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(color_key)
  
  if (show_n) {
    label_tbl <- label_tbl |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        display_label = dplyr::case_when(
          n_label == "units" ~ paste0(
            label_key,
            "\nN_pt = ",
            scales::comma(n_treated_units)
          ),
          n_label == "events" ~ paste0(
            label_key,
            "\nN_ev = ",
            scales::comma(n_treated_events)
          ),
          n_label == "both" ~ paste0(
            label_key,
            "\nN_pt = ",
            scales::comma(n_treated_units),
            "\nN_ev = ",
            scales::comma(n_treated_events)
          ),
          TRUE ~ as.character(label_key)
        )
      )
  } else {
    label_tbl <- label_tbl |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        display_label = as.character(label_key)
      )
  }
  
  dt <- dt |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      label_tbl |>
        dplyr::select(color_key, display_label),
      by = setNames("color_key", color_var)
    )
  
  color_levels <- unique(as.character(dt[[color_var]]))
  dt[[color_var]] <- factor(dt[[color_var]], levels = color_levels)
  
  if (is.null(color_values)) {
    color_values <- scales::hue_pal()(length(color_levels))
    names(color_values) <- color_levels
  } else {
    missing_colors <- setdiff(color_levels, names(color_values))
    if (length(missing_colors) > 0) {
      stop(
        "Missing colors for: ",
        paste(missing_colors, collapse = ", ")
      )
    }
    color_values <- color_values[names(color_values) %in% color_levels]
  }
  
  if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
    linetype_levels <- unique(as.character(dt[[linetype_var]]))
    dt[[linetype_var]] <- factor(dt[[linetype_var]], levels = linetype_levels)
    
    if (is.null(linetype_values)) {
      default_ltys <- c("solid", "dashed", "dotted", "dotdash", "longdash", "twodash")
      linetype_values <- default_ltys[seq_along(linetype_levels)]
      names(linetype_values) <- linetype_levels
    } else {
      missing_ltys <- setdiff(linetype_levels, names(linetype_values))
      if (length(missing_ltys) > 0) {
        stop(
          "Missing linetypes for: ",
          paste(missing_ltys, collapse = ", ")
        )
      }
      linetype_values <- linetype_values[names(linetype_values) %in% linetype_levels]
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.null(facet_var)) {
    facet_levels <- unique(as.character(dt[[facet_var]]))
    dt[[facet_var]] <- factor(dt[[facet_var]], levels = facet_levels)
  }
  
  label_map <- label_tbl$display_label
  names(label_map) <- label_tbl$color_key
  
  if (is.null(title)) {
    title <- "Dynamic DiD event-study estimates"
  }
  
  if (is.null(caption)) {
    caption <- if (show_ci) "95% confidence intervals shown" else NULL
  }
  
  if (is.null(legend_title_color)) {
    legend_title_color <- color_var
  }
  
  if (is.null(legend_title_linetype) && !is.null(linetype_var)) {
    legend_title_linetype <- linetype_var
  }
  
  if (is.null(linetype_var)) {
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      dt,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = term_value,
        y = estimate,
        color = .data[[color_var]],
        group = .data[[color_var]]
      )
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2)
  } else {
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      dt,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = term_value,
        y = estimate,
        color = .data[[color_var]],
        linetype = .data[[linetype_var]],
        group = interaction(.data[[color_var]], .data[[linetype_var]])
      )
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = 2)
  }
  
  if (show_ci) {
    if (ci_style == "ribbon") {
      if (is.null(linetype_var)) {
        p <- p +
          ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
            ggplot2::aes(
              ymin = ci_lower,
              ymax = ci_upper,
              fill = .data[[color_var]],
              group = .data[[color_var]]
            ),
            alpha = 0.15,
            color = NA
          )
      } else {
        p <- p +
          ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
            ggplot2::aes(
              ymin = ci_lower,
              ymax = ci_upper,
              fill = .data[[color_var]],
              group = interaction(.data[[color_var]], .data[[linetype_var]])
            ),
            alpha = 0.15,
            color = NA
          )
      }
    }
    
    if (ci_style == "lines") {
      if (is.null(linetype_var)) {
        p <- p +
          ggplot2::geom_line(
            ggplot2::aes(y = ci_upper),
            linewidth = 0.7,
            alpha = 0.8
          ) +
          ggplot2::geom_line(
            ggplot2::aes(y = ci_lower),
            linewidth = 0.7,
            alpha = 0.8
          )
      } else {
        p <- p +
          ggplot2::geom_line(
            ggplot2::aes(
              y = ci_upper,
              group = interaction(.data[[color_var]], .data[[linetype_var]])
            ),
            linewidth = 0.7,
            alpha = 0.8
          ) +
          ggplot2::geom_line(
            ggplot2::aes(
              y = ci_lower,
              group = interaction(.data[[color_var]], .data[[linetype_var]])
            ),
            linewidth = 0.7,
            alpha = 0.8
          )
      }
    }
  }
  
  p <- p +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
      xintercept = baseline,
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "gray40"
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
      xintercept = 0,
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "red"
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(
      yintercept = 0,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
      values = color_values,
      breaks = names(color_values),
      labels = label_map[names(color_values)],
      name = legend_title_color
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Event time",
      y = "Treatment effect",
      title = title,
      caption = caption
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(lineheight = 1.1)
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
  
  if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::scale_linetype_manual(
        values = linetype_values,
        name = legend_title_linetype
      )
  }
  
  if (show_ci && ci_style == "ribbon") {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
        values = color_values,
        guide = "none"
      )
  }
  
  if (!is.null(facet_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::facet_wrap(
        stats::as.formula(paste("~", facet_var)),
        ncol = facet_ncol,
        scales = facet_scales
      )
  }
  
  p
}



```



```{r}

analysis_colors <- c(
  bluemtns = "#1b9e77",
  aznmmtns = "#d95f02",
  cascades = "blue"
)

p <- plot_saved_sunab_general(
  coef_tbl = coef_tbl,
  filters = list(
    subgroup = "bf",
    group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
    outcome = "rap_tree",
    model_id = "sunab_main",
    vcov_id = "conley_125km_20km"
  ),
  color_var = "analysis_id",
  color_values = analysis_colors,
  show_ci = TRUE,
  ci_style = "lines",
  legend_title_color = "Ecoregion"
)

p


p <- plot_saved_sunab_general(
  coef_tbl = coef_tbl |> filter(n_treated_units >= 100),
  filters = list(
    analysis_id = "bluemtns",
    group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
    model_id = "sunab_main",
    vcov_id = "conley_125km_20km"
  ),
  color_var = "outcome",
  color_values = c(
    rap_tree = "#1b9e77",
    vcf_tree = "#d95f02"
  ),
  facet_var = "subgroup",
  facet_ncol = 2,
  show_ci = TRUE,
  ci_style = "lines",
  title = "BlueMtns b10_pdsin3t1"
)

p



```



<button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseOne" >Click to see Session Information</button><div id="collapseOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse"><div>

```{r sessionInfo}
sessionInfo()
```
